audit_items.proof_trace: The property is vacuously satisfied: geohash.c contains zero free(), zfree(), malloc(), or zmalloc() calls across all 295 lines, confirmed by full read and grep. All local variables are stack-allocated (e.g., GeoHashRange r[2], GeoHashArea area); pointer parameters are caller-owned and never freed within this file. No macros in geohash.h expand to any allocation or deallocation primitives.
